src: A waterfall cascading down a rugged cliff, surrounded by greenery and moss-covered rocks. Water splashes into a pool below, with mist and sunlight. A stone bridge arches over the waterfall, framed by trees and vibrant foliage.
edit: A waterfall cascades down an icy cliff, surrounded by snow-covered greenery and frost-covered rocks. Water splashes into a pool below, with mist catching the sunlight. A stone bridge arches over the waterfall, framed by snow-laden foliage and winter plant life.

per_image_non_shared_src.click-sluice-0bunJlJn69U-unsplash: The waterfall is centered with sunlight streaming through tree branches, tall trees with dark leaves surround. A stone bridge is in the middle, with dense green foliage and mossy rocks at the sides.
per_image_non_shared_src.dave-hoefler-DBGb9u1Yf6Q-unsplash: A waterfall is centered with golden autumn leaves surrounding it. A stone bridge stands in the middle of the cascading water. The foreground has green shrubbery and brown tree trunks.
per_image_non_shared_src.dave-hoefler-t56YSk_5SPc-unsplash: The waterfall cascades down steep rocks, surrounded by lush greenery and steep cliffs, with a stone bridge arching over the lower cascade and abundant moss and foliage covering the rocks.
per_image_non_shared_src.david-lindahl-WC0W0sESCow-unsplash: Waterfall in the center with mist, surrounded by barren trees, a stone bridge in the middle, with grey rocks and sparse foliage.
per_image_non_shared_src.ethan-dow-5wJiUOE6YNM-unsplash: Waterfall flows down a cliff face, framed by dense green trees and bright sunlight. A stone bridge spans the middle, vibrant foliage covers the cliffs.

per_image_non_shared_edit.click-sluice-0bunJlJn69U-unsplash: The waterfall is surrounded by bare winter trees and a stone bridge arches over icy water. Shadows from tall leafless trees fall nearby, with sparse, frosted foliage and snow-dusted stones.
per_image_non_shared_edit.dave-hoefler-DBGb9u1Yf6Q-unsplash: The waterfall is centered, framed by bare trees with snow-dusted branches. An icy stone bridge stands in the water. Evergreen shrubs in the foreground have frost, and snow-covered brown tree trunks create a winter scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.dave-hoefler-t56YSk_5SPc-unsplash: The waterfall cascades down steep snow-covered rocks and ice, with bare branches and frosty cliffs. A stone bridge arches over the lower cascade, with shimmering icicles hanging. Snow and ice cover the area, with moss frozen in place.
per_image_non_shared_edit.david-lindahl-WC0W0sESCow-unsplash: A waterfall cascades in the center with mist, surrounded by barren trees with snowy branches. A stone bridge spans, partly frosted, with grey rocks slick with ice and sparse foliage covered in snow, creating a winter landscape.
per_image_non_shared_edit.ethan-dow-5wJiUOE6YNM-unsplash: The waterfall cascades down an ice-covered cliff, framed by snow-dusted trees. A frosted stone bridge spans the middle, with snowy cliffs on both sides, creating a serene winter landscape of muted whites and grays.
